sections.paragraph:
verb לאסוף

to collect, gather, assemble; pick up; remove

verb להיאסף

be collected, gathered, assembled; pass away

verb לאסף

to collect, gather, assemble; pick up

verb מאוסף

be bundled together, gathered, picked up

verb להתאסף

to gather, assemble, get together, congregate

noun

Assaf, male first name (Hebrew)
